inflation.text: Inflation is roughly on target, but recent monthly momentum has turned against the disinflationary trend. Headline CPI was 2.3% y/y in March; core measures sit in a tight band of 2.0% to 2.6%. Breadth points to broad-based softening - the share of components running well below target is above the historical norm. The complication is March's +0.48% m/m print, well above the pace consistent with 2% annualized; the 3-month annualized rate is at 2.9%.
